text.tspan: heap mutated in place — (WASM linear memory is monotonic)
admit on QuickJS used heap (not raw buffer), scrub freed pages
IDLE — DO evicted, in-memory kernel GONE
generation N -> N+1 — no source replay
RESTORE guard admits on — recorded used_heap, not raw bytes
live state restored, — NO replay, NO re-fired effects

svg.text: run cell on live linear memory
reconstruct full image (apply deltas + E6 tail)
new instance + Tier-0 natives at fixed bases
